# UC-23.2.7 ┬и Average Deal Size and Deal-Mix Trend

## Description

Computes rolling **average selling price** (**ASP**) on **Closed Won** Salesforce opportunities ingested through JDBC or Bulk extracts, reconciling header Amount against **Salesforce CPQ** `SBQQ__NetAmount__c` and summed OpportunityLineItem.TotalPrice, deriving **Annual Contract Value (ACV)** when subscription terms fall below twelve months using CRM term fields or **Apttus_Config2 contract-term** months. SPL emits segment / product_tier / CurrencyIsoCode mix plus enterprise_share, multi_year_share, expansion_share, and cohort_asp_yoy momentum via streamstats Рђћ answering CFO/CRO questions about ASP trajectory (mix economics), not discount-band effectiveness.

## Value

**Chief Revenue Officer** and **Chief Financial Officer** leaders monitor average deal size and mix shifts across tiers, modules, contract length, and currency before pipeline optics mask structural drift toward smaller baskets. Rising Enterprise share with flat ASP signals packaging issues; rising multi_year_share with rising ASP improves **Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR)** narrative alignment.

## Implementation

Stand up JDBC projection tables or Bulk jobs described under dataSources; stamp OppKey uniqueness upstream; deploy macro-wrapped SPL on Dashboard Studio with fiscal-quarter tokens; refresh treasury FX assumptions outside Splunk when comparing international cohorts.

## Detailed Implementation

Prerequisites
Рђб **Splunk DB Connect** 3.x or 4.x on a **Heavy Forwarder** with JDBC to a Salesforce replica, **Snowflake secure view**, or **BigQuery export** that exposes `Opportunity`, rolled OpportunityLineItem totals, optional **Salesforce CPQ Steelbrick** `SBQQ__Quote__c.SBQQ__NetAmount__c`, and optional **Apttus_Config2 contract-term** endpoints (`Apttus_Config2__StartDate__c`, `Apttus_Config2__EndDate__c`) when **Conga CPQ / Apttus** is live.
Рђб Parallel path: **Bulk API 2.0** (`POST /services/data/v60.0/jobs/query`) using a **Connected App** with **JWT bearer** (`grant_type=urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:jwt-bearer`) landing `sourcetype=salesforce:opportunity` into `index=business` via HEC Рђћ coalesce identical field aliases to the JDBC names in the SPL.
Рђб **Splunk Add-on for Salesforce** `Splunk_TA_salesforce` on Search Heads for REST-adjunct feeds; Splunkbase packages exist as 4146 and 3549 streams Рђћ match the build your org standardizes.
Рђб Finance sign-off on whether `Amount` is **Annual Contract Value (ACV)**, **Total Contract Value (TCV)**, or multi-year prepaid so `booked_amount` logic stays consistent with FP&A models.
Рђб Roles: `srchIndexesAllowed` must include `business`; limit write access to summary outputs.
Рђб Optional SPM integrations (Anaplan Sales Performance Management, Varicent ICM, Xactly Connect) influence hunt-and-peck economics but never replace reconciling Splunk rows against authoritative CRM Amount snapshots Рђћ treat SPM tiers as explanatory overlays only.
Рђб Heavy Forwarder firewall posture matching sibling CRM UCs: allow JDBC/TLS toward warehouse hosts plus outbound HTTPS HEC toward Cloud indexers.

**Step 1 Рђћ Configure data collection**
Provision a DB Connect identity to the warehouse table that already flattens Opportunity to one logical row per OppKey or, if you ingest exploded line children, schedule a nightly aggregate that writes `LineItems_Rollup__c` beside the parent. Map SBQQ__NetAmount__c when Salesforce CPQ quotes supersede Opportunity `Amount` after approval Рђћ the coalesce order in the SPL prefers CPQ net, then summed **OpportunityLineItem.TotalPrice**, then header `Amount`.

For Apttus / Conga contracts, expose `Apttus_Config2__StartDate__c` and `Apttus_Config2__EndDate__c` through the same JDBC project; the SPL derives `term_eff` months from their span when present, otherwise falls back to CRM `term_months`. Document multi-currency policy: either store native `CurrencyIsoCode` with a treasury FX table outside Splunk, or pre-convert into functional USD upstream Рђћ the panel labels every row with `CurrencyIsoCode` so analysts do not compare JPY baskets to USD baskets without a filter.

Schedule inputs every one to four hours with a rising predicate on `**LastModifiedDate**` / `**SystemModstamp**`. Set `_time` from `CloseDate` for cohort views, not from extraction time Рђћ otherwise June closes appear in July index time and cohort_month YoY breaks. For **HubSpot Sales Hub CPQ** or **Oracle CPQ Cloud** warehouses, alias their quote-line rollups into `OpportunityLineItem_TotalPrice` before index.

Mirror **Salesforce Pricing Cube** selections when Finance rotates catalogs: persist `Pricebook2Id` plus human-readable pricebook labels (**Standard Pricebook**, **Enterprise Pricebook**, partner overlays) beside each row so product_tier mixes reflect deliberate tier uplift versus accidental SKU drift. Dual-stack tenants blending **DealHub.io**, **SAP CPQ**, **Tacton CPQ**, or **Conga Revenue Lifecycle Management (RLM)** feeds must harmonize quote identifiers (`Quote.Id`, external GUIDs) onto OpportunityId prior to Splunk Рђћ mismatched joins inflate ASP when stray orphan quotes linger outside CRM linkage.

Publish ingestion telemetry inside DB Connect UI (Settings Рєњ Database connections Рєњ **Connection status**) Рђћ stalled WAL checkpoints silently replay stale CPQ totals until JDBC threads reconnect.

**Step 2 Рђћ Create the search and alert**
Paste the SPL from the canonical `spl` field into Search & Reporting; Save As Рєњ Report named `asp_deal_mix_trajectory`. Wrap the time range macro `asp_lookback` (`-730d@d`) in `macros.conf` so rolling two fiscal years stays one edit.

Suggested alert: trigger when any `cohort_month` row for the Enterprise `segment` shows `**cohort_asp_yoy**` below negative twelve and `deals>=20` Рђћ route to Revenue Strategy, not on-call SRE. Pair a second alert on `**enterprise_share**` dropping more than eight points quarter-on-quarter while `avg_deal_size` climbs, which hints at **Mid-Market** dilution masked as growth.

Dashboard tokens: expose `segment`, `product_tier`, `CurrencyIsoCode`, and `close_year` Рђћ default to functional USD rows if you maintain a pre-filtered clone index.

Promote saved searches via Settings Рєњ Searches, reports, and alerts Рєњ Add New Рєњ Report when naming conventions demand lowercase underscores for CI/CD lint tests Рђћ identical SPL body references macro-driven earliest/latest boundaries.

**Step 3 Рђћ Validate**
Рђб Pick ten **Closed Won** opportunities from **Salesforce Lightning** spanning each `product_tier`; compare `Amount`, CPQ net, and line rollups against `booked_amount` in Splunk for the same OppKey.
Рђб Compare `avg(booked_amount)` by fiscal quarter to the CRO slide-deck totals; variance above one percent usually traces to duplicate JDBC rows or sandbox traffic.
Рђб Verify `term_eff`: for a twenty-four month Apttus agreement, confirm `apttus_months` equals manual (End Рѕњ Start) month math.
Рђб Run `| stats count by CurrencyIsoCode` after the `where` clause to ensure you are not blending FX without notice.
Рђб For DealHub.io or SAP CPQ parallel feeds, spot-check one quote where **Order Management** deferred part of TCV Рђћ if finance books only the first-year ACV in CRM, align the warehouse column before trusting `annual_contract_value`.
Рђб Compare Splunk trajectory slices against exports from **Salesforce Revenue Intelligence**, **Clari Revenue Operations Platform**, or spreadsheet extracts from **Spiff Plan** models Рђћ mismatched slopes expose ingestion drift rather than genuine economics shifts.

Optional enrichment: compute spreadsheet-level **module_attach_rate** offline from SKU manifests and contrast against Splunk counts when rolled totals bundle attach SKUs behind one summary row Рђћ divergence warns packaging taxonomy drift.

**Step 4 Рђћ Operationalize**
Publish a Dashboard Studio workbook: Row 1 trellis line of `avg_deal_size` by `cohort_month` split with `segment` overlays; Row 2 stacked area of `enterprise_share`, `multi_year_share`, `**expansion_share**` on a common axis with a secondary scale for percentages; Row 3 heatmap `product_tier` ├Ќ `close_quarter` with `avg_acv`; Row 4 table with drilldown on `OppKey` via a chained Drilldown search that opens Salesforce `https://` + instance + `/{OppKey}` pattern you standardize.

Add a narrative text panel citing **OpenView Partners** median ACV bands, Sequoia growth commentary, Bessemer **Net Dollar Retention (NDR)** expectations, and Gartner cycle-length medians Рђћ these are interpretive guardrails, not Splunk thresholds.

Route monthly output to FP&A with a static PDF export the same hour finance closes subledger.

Annotate dashboards whenever conversational telemetry (**Gong Revenue Intelligence**, **Outreach Operations Cloud**) forecasts upside yet Splunk ASP slopes downward Рђћ lag between verbal commits and booked signatures clarifies narrative gaps without rewriting SPL.

**Step 5 Рђћ Troubleshooting**

Рђб `SBQQ__NetAmount__c` always zero Рђћ CPQ approvals never wrote back before extract time; widen JDBC watermark or pull Quote snapshot sourcetype `dbx:sf_sbqq_quote` and join on OpportunityId before trusting header Amount.

Рђб `OpportunityLineItem_TotalPrice` double-counts Рђћ ingestion exploded lines without collapsing to parent; enforce dedup OppKey after verifying one row per opportunity or aggregate upstream.

Рђб `cohort_asp_yoy` null everywhere Рђћ fewer than thirteen cohort_month buckets landed for that segment / CurrencyIsoCode pair; loosen **streamstats** window or narrow splits until history exists.

Рђб `enterprise_share` exceeds one hundred Рђћ duplicate rows inflated deals_ent; inspect `stats` pre-stage for accidental Cartesian joins when merging SPM extracts.

Рђб `annual_contract_value` blows up for tiny `term_eff` Рђћ guard clause missing when Apttus dates malformed (`term_eff` near zero); add `where term_eff>=1`.

Рђб `CurrencyIsoCode` scatter includes `_MISSING` Рђћ REST CSV omitted ISO codes; fix props.conf **FIELDALIAS** or warehouse SELECT.

Рђб `Closed Won` rows missing after upgrade Рђћ stage picklist rebranded (РђюClosed Won Рђћ VerifiedРђЮ); extend `like(StageName,"%Closed Won%")` with OR explicit matches agreed with RevOps.

Рђб `multi_year_share` stuck at zero Рђћ **Subscription_Term_Months__c** never populated for CPQ; map **SBQQ__SubscriptionTerm__c** instead.

Рђб `expansion_share` flat Рђћ Type field blank on expansions; populate Opportunity RecordType or custom **Renewal_vs_New__c** and adjust expansion_flag logic.

Рђб `streamstats` order wrong Рђћ forgot `sort cohort_month` before windowed math; reorder pipeline per canonical SPL.

Рђб Quarter compare noisy near fiscal boundaries Рђћ align macros to corporate fiscal_period lookup rather than Gregorian `close_quarter` when fiscal calendars diverge.

Рђб `dedup` removes legitimate amendments Рђћ multiple Closed Won snapshots per OppKey exist because CRM reopened/changed Рђћ prefer `latest` snapshot via `sort + LastModifiedDate` inside `dedup` sort fields.

Рђб Ramp-heavy territories skew cohort ASP Рђћ rookie-heavy patches temporarily suppress averages without altering Enterprise shelf velocity; blend Splunk rows with HR-supplied tenure overlays (`hire_epoch`) before blaming packaging.

Рђб `CurrencyIsoCode` snapshot mismatch vs treasury daily curve Рђћ Splunk normalized USD differs from ERP recognition month-close rates; reconcile against FP&A FX workbook rather than SPL tweaks.

Рђб `module_attach_rate` workbook fights Splunk tier counts Рђћ marketing SKU catalogs renamed AnalyticsPlus Рєњ AnalyticsGuard rails mis-tag product_tier labels though dollar totals intact Рђћ rename dictionaries upstream.

Рђб `probability`-weighted exploratory searches reused accidentally Рђћ analysts paste SPL fragments carrying `**Probability**` filters into ASP dashboards Рђћ strip probability predicates entirely because closed-won math ignores likelihood remainders.

## SPL

```spl
index=business sourcetype="dbx:crm_opportunities" earliest=-730d@d latest=now()
| eval OppKey=coalesce(Id, id, OpportunityId)
| eval StageName=coalesce(StageName, stage_name)
| eval CloseD=strptime(if(match(coalesce(CloseDate,close_date),"^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}"),substr(coalesce(CloseDate,close_date),1,10),null()),"%Y-%m-%d")
| eval CurrencyIsoCode=coalesce(CurrencyIsoCode, currency_iso_code, "USD")
| eval segment=coalesce(Account_Segment__c, segment, "Unassigned")
| eval product_tier=coalesce(Product_Tier__c, SBQQ__ProductFamily__c, product_tier, "Standard")
| eval term_months=tonumber(coalesce(term_months, Subscription_Term_Months__c, SBQQ__SubscriptionTerm__c, "12"))
| eval SBQQ__NetAmount__c=tonumber(coalesce(SBQQ__NetAmount__c, cpq_quote_net, "0"))
| eval OpportunityLineItem_TotalPrice=tonumber(coalesce(LineItems_Rollup__c, OpportunityLineItem_TotalPrice, "0"))
| eval Amount=tonumber(coalesce(Amount, amount, "0"))
| eval Apttus_Config2__StartDate__c=coalesce(Apttus_Config2__StartDate__c, apttus_cfg_start_date)
| eval Apttus_Config2__EndDate__c=coalesce(Apttus_Config2__EndDate__c, apttus_cfg_end_date)
| eval apttus_months=if(isnotnull(Apttus_Config2__StartDate__c) AND isnotnull(Apttus_Config2__EndDate__c), round((strptime(substr(Apttus_Config2__EndDate__c,1,10),"%Y-%m-%d")-strptime(substr(Apttus_Config2__StartDate__c,1,10),"%Y-%m-%d"))/2592000,0), null())
| eval term_eff=coalesce(apttus_months, term_months)
| eval booked_amount=case(SBQQ__NetAmount__c>0, SBQQ__NetAmount__c, OpportunityLineItem_TotalPrice>0, OpportunityLineItem_TotalPrice, 1=1, Amount)
| eval annual_contract_value=if(term_eff>0 AND term_eff<12, booked_amount*12/term_eff, booked_amount)
| eval expansion_flag=if(match(lower(coalesce(Type, opp_type,"")),"expansion"),1,0)
| where like(StageName,"%Closed Won%")
| eval close_year=strftime(CloseD,"%Y")
| eval close_quarter=strftime(CloseD,"%Y")."-Q".tostring(ceil(tonumber(strftime(CloseD,"%m"))/3))
| eval cohort_month=strftime(CloseD,"%Y-%m")
| dedup OppKey sortby + CloseD
| eval multi_year_flag=if(term_eff>=24,1,0)
| stats count as deals sum(booked_amount) as total_contract_value sum(annual_contract_value) as acv_pool avg(booked_amount) as avg_deal_size avg(annual_contract_value) as avg_acv sum(multi_year_flag) as multiyear_deals sum(expansion_flag) as expansion_deals by cohort_month segment product_tier CurrencyIsoCode close_year close_quarter
| eval multi_year_share=if(deals>0, round(100*multiyear_deals/deals,1), null())
| eval expansion_share=if(deals>0, round(100*expansion_deals/deals,1), null())
| eval arr_run_rate=round(acv_pool,2)
| eventstats sum(deals) as deals_tot sum(eval(if(segment=="Enterprise" OR segment=="Strategic",deals,0))) as deals_ent by cohort_month CurrencyIsoCode close_year close_quarter
| eval enterprise_share=if(deals_tot>0, round(100*deals_ent/deals_tot,1), null())
| sort cohort_month segment product_tier CurrencyIsoCode close_year close_quarter
| streamstats global=f window=12 first(avg_deal_size) as asp_prior_year by segment product_tier CurrencyIsoCode
| eval cohort_asp_yoy=if(isnotnull(asp_prior_year) AND asp_prior_year>0, round(100*(avg_deal_size-asp_prior_year)/asp_prior_year,1), null())
| table cohort_month close_year close_quarter segment product_tier CurrencyIsoCode deals avg_deal_size avg_acv enterprise_share multi_year_share expansion_share cohort_asp_yoy total_contract_value arr_run_rate
```

## Visualization

Dashboard Studio: dual-axis cohort_month line for avg_deal_size versus trailing enterprise_share; trellis column chart of avg_acv by product_tier; heatmap segment ├Ќ close_quarter for cohort_asp_yoy; stacked-area trio (multi_year_share, expansion_share, residual single-year); drilldown splunk.table carrying CurrencyIsoCode badges.
